## Problem

What problem does this solve? What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Sketch the API surface if you can (component parameters,
bridge operation, renderer behavior, …).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why they fall short.

## Scope

Check `docs/planning/ROADMAP.md` first — if this fits an existing milestone,
say which one. Both shells exist: Android (Kotlin) and iOS (Swift/UIKit, shipped
in M5). iOS is **simulator-only** for now — real-device iOS (code signing,
provisioning, App Store validation) needs an Apple Developer account and is
**M9**, so anything that depends on running on physical iOS hardware is blocked
until then.

## Additional context

Links, prior art, screenshots.
